task: Implement the first working local dashboard MVP for Codes-Project-Viewer.

linked_goal.reason: The task implements the local dashboard visualizer and parser for the shared .agent-dashboard progress source.

summary: Built a local-first Next.js dashboard MVP that reads this repository's .agent-dashboard files, normalizes legacy statuses, displays the required project state sections, and reports parser warnings.

completed_work.title: Next.js app scaffold
completed_work.evidence: Added package.json, Next.js config, TypeScript config, Tailwind/PostCSS setup, app layout, global styles, and dashboard page.

completed_work.title: Local dashboard parser
completed_work.evidence: Added parser support for current-status.json, project.yaml, goals/main.yaml, runs/*.json, reports/latest.md, and report-schema.md presence.

completed_work.title: Status normalization
completed_work.evidence: Added canonical status types and legacy status normalization for older dashboard reports.

completed_work.title: Dashboard UI
completed_work.evidence: Dashboard displays project status, current focus, completed count, remaining work, blockers, recent runs, parser warnings, and latest report preview.

completed_work.title: Local verification
completed_work.evidence: TypeScript, production build, and HTTP section checks passed.

remaining_work: Add fixture-based parser tests for valid, missing, and malformed .agent-dashboard files.
Add sync-safety-rules.md enforcement before cloud sync work.
Replace starter project context with product-specific details.

blockers.title: Placeholder task details
blockers.details: The earlier placeholder implementation request remains blocked until actual task details are supplied.

verification.name: typecheck
verification.details: next typegen and tsc --noEmit completed successfully.

verification.name: local_dashboard_http_check
verification.details: Production server returned expected dashboard section text for Project Status, Current Focus, Completed Work, Remaining Work, Blockers, Recent Runs, Latest Report, and Codes Project Viewer.

next_recommended_prompts: Add fixture-based parser tests for valid, missing, and malformed .agent-dashboard files in the local dashboard app.
Extend the local dashboard parser to enforce .agent-dashboard/protocol/sync-safety-rules.md before any cloud sync work.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, private keys, env files, or raw logs were added.
